name: Samsung 980 PCIe 3.0 x4 3500MB/s M.2 Nvme SSD – 1TB
highlights: Designed for high-speed computing, it features PCIe 3
2 2280 form factor, delivering impressive sequential read speeds up to 3,500 MB/s and write speeds up to 3,000 MB/s
Equipped with advanced Samsung V-NAND technology, this SSD ensures exceptional reliability and durability
Ideal for demanding applications and multitasking, it includes a 1 Year warranty for peace of mind
